'''Abric''' was a ship thief working with [[Niles Ferrier]] in [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]], during the [[Thrawn campaign|Thrawn Crisis]]. He was at least familiar with Ferrier's ship, which he was ordered to prepare for launch from [[New Cov/Legends|New Cov]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Force Rising]]'' {{Ab|Dark Force Rising (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1stm|in book}}
